title: Fix Footer logo to use new uploaded logo image

requirements.text: In Footer.tsx, replace the current N.B. Farm logo image in the bottom-left brand area (above the quick navigation links section) with the newly uploaded logo image at '/assets/generated/nb-farm-logo.png'. Display it at an appropriate size (e.g., height 48–64px) consistent with how the logo appears in the navigation bar. Preserve all other footer content and styling unchanged.

quotes: the logo at the bottom most on the left side of N.B. Farm is still unchaged above the quick links section please correct it to the new one i uploaded

acceptanceCriteria: The Footer displays the new logo image from '/assets/generated/nb-farm-logo.png' in the bottom-left brand area above the quick navigation links.
The old/placeholder logo image is no longer shown in the footer.
The logo renders at an appropriate size (approximately 48–64px height) without distortion.
All other footer content (tagline, address, phone numbers, email, quick links, copyright) remains unchanged.
The footer layout and earthy theme styling remain consistent.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not alter any other section or component outside of Footer.tsx.
Use '/assets/generated/nb-farm-logo.png' as the exact image path.
nonGoals: Changing the logo in Navigation.tsx (already completed in a previous version).
Adding PhonePe or any payment gateway integration.
Modifying any other section of the website.
